Off Calendar Jul-17-2009 Continued To Aug-26-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice And Motion To Compel Further Discovery Responses, And For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Mar-27-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Ted A. Smith, Esq., for defendant and moving party: Hartford Casualty Insurance Company
Michael McCloskey, Esq., for plaintiff and opposing party: Matthew McCarthy
After hearing, tentative ruling is adopted as modified.
1. Defendant Hartford Casualty Insurance Company's motion to compel further discovery responses granted in part, denied in part:
a. Request for production No. 5, granted;
i. Plaintiff shall produce documents related to his income, and/or loss of income for the period specified in defendant's request for production;
ii. Plaintiff may comply with this order by providing documentation of his income obtained from his employer(s); or may provide copies of Forms W-2 or 1099; in either event, the documents may be redacted to prevent disclosure of plaintiff's social security number or similar private data.
iii. To the extent that plaintiff claims a privilege with regard to any documents subject to this order, plaintiff shall provide a code compliant privilege log.
b. Request for production No. 6, GRANTED, provided that plaintiff will provide copies of Credit Union or bank statement for July 1, 2007 to December 32, 2007, redacted so that only the name of the accountholder, deposit and ending balance are recorded.
c. Plaintiff shall produce documents in a code compliant supplemental response, and provide a privilege log, if necessary, within ten days of the date of service of this order.
2. Request for monetary sanctions denied.
Commissioner: Paul Slavit. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-16-2009 Set For Trial On Aug-10-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Jul-24-09 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 502
